content:
Alongside the ongoing price drops on AirPods Pro 3 and AirPods 4 down at $99, today’s 9to5Toys Lunch Break is headlined by an interesting offer on this 24GB M5 MacBook Air config at $400 less than the model Amazon sells ($219 off list), joined by the base 1TB M5 Pro MacBook hitting a new Amazon all-time low at $205 off. We also have this 256GB M3 iPad Air down to its lowest clearance price to date at $250 off, unlocked iPhone Air at nearly $100 off, and the Jet Black 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 cell at $130 off. AirTag discounts, chargers, and everything else await below.

AirPods Pro 3 just dropped back down to one of the best prices in months at Amazon

After jumping back up in price late Wednesday morning of last week, Amazon has once again dropped Apple’s AirPods Pro 3 back down to the lowest price in months.

Amazon is now offering the latest AirPods Pro 3 down at $199.99 shipped. Regularly $249, this is nearly $50 off the list price and the lowest we can find.

This 24GB M5 MacBook Air config is now $400 less than the model Amazon sells ($219 off list)

The new M5 MacBook Air deals are flying at Amazon this week with at least $149 off just about every configuration starting from the most affordable base model at $950 and going right up to the 24GB/1TB config. However, we spotted quite a compelling offer at B&H this morning on a configuration you can’t buy from Amazon at $219 off the list price from Apple.

B&H is now offering the 15-inch M5 MacBook Air with 24GB of RAM and a 512GB SSD down at $1,299 shipped.

This is a regularly $1,499 machine in a setup you will not find on Amazon and your usual official retailers – the most affordable 15-inch 24GB model Amazon sells has 1TB of storage and a $1,699 list price. It is, however, on sale for $1,549 right now and does have double the storage as the B&H offer above, but still quite a bit more expensive.

  • 13-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/512GB from $950 (Reg. $1,099)
  • 13-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/1TB from $1,149 (Reg. $1,299)
  • 13-inch M5 MacBook Air 24GB/1TB from $1,349 (Reg. $1,499)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/512GB from $1,149 (Reg. $1,299)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 16GB/1TB from $1,349 (Reg. $1,499)
  • 15-inch M5 MacBook Air 24GB/1TB from $1,549 (Reg. $1,699)

Today’s deal is $400 under the list price on the only 24GB machine Amazon sells, $250 under the sale price on that model, and the best we can find.

Here’s an another thing to consider, this B&H bundle ships with the Apple 35W Dual USB-C Port Compact Power Adapter, not the 40W model that comes in the box standard elsewhere. So while it is a slightly slower charging speed, it delivers two USB-C charging ports for your other gear and an option Apple will charge you an extra $20 for – today’s deal is actually $219 off:

These are, over the last generation or two, the sorts of deals where B&H really shines. There are plenty of big box authorized dealers with better prices on the standard configurations, and nearly as many boutique authorized dealers with discounts on the heavily upgraded and pricey models, but B&H can sometimes slip right into the more affordable end of things with a deal on a machine you can’t get anywhere else at a price like this.

Base model 1TB M5 Pro MacBook hits new Amazon all-time low at $205 off, more

The MacBook deals are carrying through this week again. This morning we have already spotted an M5 MacBook Air at $219 off the list price and now we are adding a new Amazon all-time low on the base model M5 Pro MacBook Pro that just released last month at $205 off the list.

Amazon has been getting aggressive on Apple’s most affordable base model M5 Pro MacBook Pro. This is the 14-inch model that, despite being the entry model in the lineup, lands with 24GB of RAM and 1TB of storage to support the new M5 Pro chip.

Regularly $2,199, the price has now dropped once again to $1,994 shipped. While still quite an investment by just about anyone’s standards, we are, arguably, talking about one of the best laptops on the planet at the lowest price we have ever tracked online. This is a new Amazon all-time low at $205 off the list price and a great opportunity to land one without waiting all year until Black Friday rolls around when we might see the lineup in the $250 off range.

This deal also joins updated deal pricing across the latest 2025 M5 and 2026 M5 Pro lineups you can check out below:

  • 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 24GB/1TB $1,994 (Reg. $2,199) – new Amazon all-time low
  • 14-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 24GB/2TB $2,645 (Reg. $2,799)
  • 16-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 24GB/2TB $2,549 (Reg. $2,699)
  • 16-inch M5 Pro MacBook Pro 48GB/1TB $2,899 (Reg. $3,099)
  • 14-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 36GB/2TB $3,359 (Reg. $3,599)
  • 16-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 36GB/2TB $3,699 (Reg. $3,899)
  • 16-inch M5 Max MacBook Pro 48GB/2TB $4,199 (Reg. $4,399)

This 256GB M3 iPad Air just hit a new all-time low clearance price at Amazon, now $250 off

This week has ushered in another shot at some seriously notable clearance prices on M3 iPad Air models. However, prices have dropped even lower on select models, including the 1TB 13-inch at an impressive $300 off the list price as well as this far more affordable 256GB 11-inch at $250 off.

Amazon is now offering the 256GB 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell model down at $599 shipped in Starlight. The Blue model is also sitting at its $649 Amazon all-time low right now as well.

Originally $849, this is $250 off the list price and the best price we can find. Today’s deal is also another $50 off the price we were tracking earlier this week to deliver a new Amazon all-time low.

Again the more pricey 1TB model is actually at $300 off the original list right now, but as far as the less expensive models go, we almost never see any of them at $250 off in brand new condition and this is the first time this particular configuration has been down at a price like this.

Alongside the new M4 iPad Air deals we featured this morning, here’s a look at some of the other M3 models live at clearance-worthy pricing right now:

  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 256GB from $599 (Reg. $849)
  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 512GB $799 (Reg. $1,049) – new Amazon all-time low
  • 11-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 1TB $999 (Reg. $1,249)
  • 13-inch M3 iPad Air Wi-Fi + Cell 1TB $1,149 (Reg. $1,449)

Score unlocked iPhone Air at nearly $100 off today (All colors/configs)


Best Buy launched a new Featured Top Deals of the Week sale a couple days ago with hundreds in savings on home appliances, smart TVs, and more. But we also spotted another chance to score a deal on unlocked iPhone Air models in brand new condition. 

Deals on current-generation iPhone models is rare in unlocked condition. We will soon start to see some solid deals on iPhone 17 series devices in renewed and used condition, but you can already land a straight up cash discount on iPhone Air in brand new condition at Best Buy.

It is offering all configurations and colors of Apple’s latest ultra-thin device at $99 off the list price. This is matching the second-lowest price we have tracked to date – there was one opportunity before today to score them at $149 off, but literally only once. It is rare to see them any lower than they are today so far.

  • iPhone Air unlocked 256GB $900 (Reg. $1,000)
  • iPhone Air unlocked 512GB $1,100 (Reg. $1,200)
  • iPhone Air unlocked 1TB $1,300 (Reg. $1,400)

The camera on the iPhone Air leaves a little to be desired when it comes to idiot-proof photography, but that’s, in my opinion, really only the case if you’re used to years of iPhone Pro-grade action like I am. This is perhaps a personal thing, but either way, the look and feel of this thing in the hand is supremely elegant and a joy to use on the daily.

Again, deals on the 17 and 17 Pro are coming sooner than later if last generation is any indication, but almost certainly not in brand new, unlocked condition like these Air deals.

Grab a 4-pack of AirTags at one of the best prices ever from $14 each, AirTag 2 open-box at $21 each

Today’s accessories and charging deals:

  • Just $35 today gets you this display-equipped SSD enclosure with power-loss protection (All-time low)
  • Anker’s originally $110 Prime Power Station with smart display now down at $60 shipped
  • This 8-in-1 USB-C docking station packs 4K 60Hz HDMI and even an M.2 SSD enclosure for $41.50 (Reg. $65)
  • ECOVACS’ window cleaning WINBOT W2 PRO Omni robot with a 6-in-1 station hits $399 (Second-best at $101 off)
  • Score up to $57 exclusive savings on Anker’s eufy Video Doorbell E340 + add-on chime bundle at second-best prices from $105
  • LISEN’s Apple Watch cable bundled with a 20W wall charger is only $16 right now
  • Road trip coming up? Grab this iPad headrest mount for $10 Prime shipped (67% off)

Amazon delivering new MacBook Neo as early as tomorrow from $590, still up to 3 weeks from Apple

MacBook Neo orders are still significantly delayed at Apple, currently listed at 2 or 3 weeks for delivery on our end. Amazon, however, has secured more stock and you can grab one there down at $589.99 with delivery as early as tomorrow.

There are still some of the upgraded 512GB models that are delayed over at Amazon, but as of the time of writing, all four colors on the base 256GB models are listed as delivering either tomorrow or the next day. This is the first time we have seen this sort of selection on Apple’s all-new, ultra-affordable (by Apple standards) MacBook delivering this quickly in weeks at Amazon.

  • MacBook Neo Citrus 256GB $590 – $10 off w/ delivery by tomorrow
  • MacBook Neo Citrus 512GB $690 – $10 off delivery delayed until May 4
  • MacBook Neo Silver 256GB $590 – $10 off delivery in two days
  • MacBook Neo Silver 512GB $690 – $10 off delivery delayed until May 5
  • MacBook Neo Indigo 256GB $590 – $10 off w/ delivery by tomorrow
  • MacBook Neo Indigo 512GB $690 – $10 off w/ delivery by tomorrow
  • MacBook Neo Blush 256GB $590 – $10 off w/ delivery by tomorrow
  • MacBook Neo Blush 512GB $690 – $10 off delivery delayed until May 4

Clearly the discount here isn’t much, not even really enough to justify buying one at Amazon over Apple. But the shipping times here are super nice and a whole lot faster than Apple. There is very much a chance we start to see the base model slip again at some point, but as of right now you’re new MacBook will be on your door step as early as tomorrow morning.

We recommend popping over to Walmart’s MacBook Neo listings if the color/config you’re after is still delayed at Amazon. You won’t get the extra $10 in savings there, but it has 512GB variants shipping as early as tomorrow right now as well.

Best Buy also happens to have some discounted “excellent” condition open-box units live with delivery as early as tomorrow as well:

  • MacBook Neo 256GB Silver $560 (Reg. $599 new)
  • MacBook Neo 256GB Blush $580 (Reg. $599 new)
  • MacBook Neo 256GB Citrus $576 (Reg. $599 new)
  • MacBook Neo 512GB w/ Touch ID Indigo $665 (Reg. $699 new)
  • MacBook Neo 512GB w/ Touch ID Silver $677 (Reg. $699 new)
  • MacBook Neo 512GB w/ Touch ID Blush $677 (Reg. $699 new)

Score Mom a new Apple Watch Series 11 at up to $130 off (All color options on sale)

One of the best deals we have tracked to date on Apple Watch Series 11 is live right now at Amazon – the 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 GPS + Cell model at $130 off. We are now tracking both the Jet Black model and the Rose Gold color, either of which might make for a super sweet Mother’s Day gift this year.

Admittedly, a brand new Series 11 is quite a generous Mother’s Day gift, but if you are looking to treat mom this year, a new Apple Watch might be perfect.

Not only are we tracking some of the best deals ever on the GPS + Cell models to keep mom always connected, but you’ll also find just about all color options, from the Rose Gold with blush band through to the silver and Jet Black that can work with just about any outfit, marked down by at least $100 with deals starting from $299 shipped right now:

  • 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 $299 (Reg. $399)
  • 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 $329 (Reg. $429)
  • 42mm Apple Watch Series 11 GPS + Cell $399 (Reg. $499)
  • 46mm Apple Watch Series 11 GPS + Cell $399 (Reg. $529)

And if mom already has the Apple Watch she needs, a new band or two for a summer refresh can make for a notable and even more affordable gift option:
